What is going on guys? Okay, so we are here at probably one of the most important parts for you to be able to get the best help from your coach. Okay, so in this program, you are going to be able to hop on these daily calls and these daily calls are where you're going to be able to come with your questions, come figure out how to optimize your campaign, how to just 10 extra results that you're getting, right? But the only way that you can do that is if you have your numbers, okay? And I cannot stress this enough. We cannot make decisions if they're not based off of numbers or those would just be emotional decisions and you don't want to do that. So what you're going to do here is just open up a Google sheet. You can do it in Excel if you want. I recommend Google sheet so that way you can share this with whoever your coach is. And you're just going to go ahead and just add in these columns here, right? You want to put the date, the ad spend, number of leads, appointment scheduled, appointment showed, appointments closed, total down payments, total contract value, okay? So now let me give you some tips here real quick. So let's just say that we're going to go ahead and do today. We're doing 10.19. Now what I highly recommend is for these two numbers here, your ad spend and your number of leads, wait until the next morning, right? So I'm going to wait until tomorrow morning on the 20th to go into my ads manager so that way I can see the full 24 hours of ad spend on 10.19. Let's say it was 200 bucks and I was able to get 20 leads off of that, okay? So that's the best time to do it because for example, if you close out your business at 8 p.m. and you're inputting your stats, you still have from 8 to 12 a.m. for where you can still spend money in that day and still get leads, okay? Now the things that you should close out at the end of the day every single day, just pretty much after you're done with sales would be how many appointment schedules, maybe 10 schedule, let's say six showed and four closed, okay? So you want to go ahead and put that down for every single day and then down payment is going to be what did the person pay on that same day, okay? So let's, and then the contract value is going to be the total contract, okay? So let's say that you're using the Dynastascript, they're paying full for 30 weeks, they drop $3,000, the contract would be 3,000, but let's just say they only paid, you know, 1,500 upfront, then 1,500 would go here and the total down payments, okay? So track the stuff, track it every single day. This will make a huge difference when it comes to you actually getting help from your coach. Now once you have your coach, okay, once you know who that is, then I highly recommend you come here, you share this, so we'll save that, share it with whoever your coach is, okay? You'll get their email on the welcome call and then you just want to share your sheet with them so that they can always help you out and always see access or see your stats.
